subject: Sports
title: Football and National Identity
description: A quick win: understand Football and National Identity.

hook.text: When your country scores in a World Cup, millions feel it together. Football unites like nothing else.

buildup.text: For many small nations, football is the primary way they appear on the world stage.

discovery.text: Iceland, population 350,000, reached the 2018 World Cup. The entire country celebrated as one.

twist.text: Football can also divide. Colonial histories, ethnic tensions, and political rivalries play out on the pitch.

climax.text: A national team's jersey is more than a shirt—it's a flag people choose to wear with pride.

punchline.text: Eleven players on a pitch can make a nation feel invincible.

quiz.question: How does football relate to national identity?
options: It gives nations a way to express pride and appear on the global stage
It has no connection to politics
Only large countries care about football
